title: Hirslanden Klinik Linde, Biel
heading: Klinik Linde

sections.heading: Hirslanden Klinik Linde
sections.summary: Full-bleed banner image (4:1 on desktop, 1:1 on mobile) with city label 'Biel' and h1 overlaid on bottom-left. Search form integrated in the middle stage below the image. No CTA button in hero.

Horizontal carousel/slider featuring rotating promotional banners. Each slide contains: image (left), category tag, article title, short description text, and a CTA link ('Erfahren Sie hier mehr' / 'Mehr erfahren'). Slides include: Rückgratgeber (Wirbelsäule & Schmerz), Zimmer-Upgrade Maternité (Hirslanden Baby), Orthopädie-Sport, Dialysezentrum Linde (Nephrologie), Beleghebammen an der Klinik Linde, Haben Sie eine Veranlagung für Krebs?

Two-column layout (66/33 split). Left column: lead paragraph introducing the clinic's philosophy — 'Wir bieten eine erstklassige Grundversorgung und setzen darauf aufbauend gezielt Schwerpunkte...' Right column: contact card with clinic name, address (Blumenrain 105, 2503 Biel), phone (+41 32 366 41 11), emergency line (+41 32 366 41 12), and email (klinik-linde@hirslanden.ch).

sections.heading: Hygienemassnahmen
sections.summary: Callout/highlighted text box with hygiene notice. Short paragraph about respiratory etiquette and visitor restrictions for symptomatic individuals. Includes a PDF link for respiratorische Etikette.

Six quicklink tiles in a 3-column responsive grid (6 items across 2 rows). Each tile: icon + label. Links: Notfallzentrum Linde (icon-emergency), Informationen für Besucher (icon-info), Babygalerie (icon-medical-stroller), Zentren, Institute, Leistungsangebot (icon-clinic), Ihr Feedback an die Klinik Linde (icon-megaphone), Jobs & Karriere (icon-diploma).

Three equal-width image teasers (33/33/33 grid): 1) Unser Leistungsangebot → /de/klinik-linde/fachgebiete.html, 2) Notfallzentrum Linde with description 'Schnell, kompetent, menschlich / Sieben Tage pro Woche, rund um die Uhr' → /de/klinik-linde/centers/notfallzentrum-biel.html, 3) Ihr Aufenthalt → /de/klinik-linde/ihr-aufenthalt.html. Each tile: background image + h3 title, optionally a short description.

Two-column layout (50/50). Left: large primary image teaser for Brustzentrum Bern Biel. Right: two stacked secondary (sideway/horizontal) teasers: 'Gemeinsam ins Leben' → Geburtenabteilung, and 'Radiologiezentrum' → Radiologiezentrum. Horizontal teasers have thumbnail left, h3 + paragraph right.

sections.heading: Kurse und Veranstaltungen
sections.summary: Filtered list of upcoming events/courses on a dark blue (background-primary) full-width band. Shows 6 items: date (day + month), location, event title. Includes 'Alle Kurse und Veranstaltungen' link. Events shown: Akupunkturtherapien, Geburtsvorbereitung Wochenendkurs (10. Jul.), Informationsabend Geburt (25. Jun.), Rückbildungskurse (18. Aug.), Stillcafé für Mamis (03. Jul.), Welche Therapien helfen bei Übergewicht?

sections.heading: Medienmitteilungen und News
sections.summary: Filtered list of latest news/press releases. 4 items shown: release type badge (Medienmitteilung/News), date, headline, clinic name. Items: 'Weniger Durst vor der Operation' (28.05.2026), 'Herzlich willkommen Rose' (03.01.2026), 'Geburten in der Klinik Linde' (29.12.2025), 'Reinhold Karl gibt den Kochlöffel weiter' (16.01.2025). Includes 'Alle Medienmitteilungen und News' link.
AIAIBot chat widget injected via script (b96d4b94-8887-4d90-8622-e3a290084e51). Wrapped in a cookie-consent gate — only shown if functional cookies are accepted.

images.role: hero — full-bleed banner image with responsive art-direction (4:1 desktop, 2:1 tablet, 1:1 mobile)
slider slide — Beleghebammen an der Klinik Linde
secondary teaser — Gemeinsam ins Leben / Geburtenabteilung

templateSpecificData.emergencyHours: 24 Stunden / 7 Tage (Notfallzentrum: Sieben Tage pro Woche, rund um die Uhr)
templateSpecificData.seoDescription: Die führende Privatklinik in der Region Biel-Seeland-Berner Jura bietet erstklassige Grundversorgung und darauf aufbauend gezielt Schwerpunkte. Zum Wohl unserer Patienten.

layoutNotes: Source URL /de/klinik-linde redirects to canonical /de/klinik-linde/home.html (legacy AEM Sites, not EDS). The page is the clinic homepage (equivalent to a 'clinic detail' landing page in the EDS migration). Key structural patterns: (1) dual-logo header with clinic name overlay + hamburger sidebar nav; (2) full-bleed hero with city badge and h1; (3) search bar integrated below hero as 'middleStage'; (4) awareness banner slider (editorial promotions per specialty); (5) 66/33 intro + contact card; (6) callout hygiene notice; (7) icon quicklinks 3×2 grid; (8) three-column image teaser row; (9) mixed 50/50 layout with one large + two horizontal teasers; (10) events list on dark blue band; (11) news list; (12) footer with SEO text + social links + nav accordion + emergency 144 number. No breadcrumb rendered in HTML (single-level clinic site). Images all served from Mediclinic Scene7 CDN. Contact card (address/phone/emergency/email) is a standalone component in the right sidebar of the intro grid. The dev server at localhost:3000 is proxying stardust.style, not Hirslanden — all content was fetched directly from www.hirslanden.ch.
